surfaces.toolchain: Heft for v1.22+, legacy gulp for existing <= v1.21.1 projects
components: web parts on modern and classic pages
notes: Use the current compatibility table for exact Node, TypeScript, and React alignment.

components: web parts on classic and modern pages
notes: Treat as a fixed legacy compatibility baseline.
Do not assume Teams, Viva Connections, Form Customizer, or library-component guidance from SharePoint Online applies unchanged.

components: document only features validated for the target farm
notes: The current compatibility table lists SharePoint Server Subscription Edition support through SPFx v1.5.
The supported-platforms page and the detailed 2019 or Subscription Edition article describe Subscription Edition as sharing the same dependencies or requirements as SharePoint Server 2019.
Package stance: keep recommendations conservative at the SharePoint Server 2019 baseline unless local validation or newer official guidance proves more.

surfaces.toolchain: same as the backing SharePoint Online SPFx project
components: web part as Teams personal app
messaging extension support with a custom Teams package and supporting bot or task-module flow
notes: Use supportedHosts and SharePoint Online deployment.
Do not install custom Teams JS SDK versions inside SPFx components.

surfaces.toolchain: same as the backing SharePoint Online SPFx project
components: dashboard deep links to Teams or SharePoint experiences
notes: The same dashboard cards can appear across desktop, tablet, and mobile experiences.
